message:
feat(freeze): Migrate problematic opcodes to C builder (Phase 3)

Migrate three opcodes that previously had trampoline/non-trampoline bugs
to use the structured CBuilder API:

1. iterator_check_object - type check with throw error
2. iterator_close - complex nested blocks with exception handling
3. inc_loc - local variable increment with context-aware var names

Added new builder helpers:
- emitThrowTypeError() - for type check failures
- emitExceptionCheckWithCleanup() - exception check with cleanup code

The builder automatically handles:
- is_trampoline differences (break vs return)
- Context-aware variable names (locals vs frame->locals)
- Proper brace balancing via RAII blocks

All 20 c_builder tests pass. Benchmarks unchanged:
- fib(45): 23.47ms AOT
- loop sumArray: 0.11ms AOT
